title: Slack
subtitle: Team messaging and workflow automation platform
comments: Using spec directly from the GitHub repo (slackapi/slack-api-specs) because the deployed version at api.slack.com/specs is outdated and causes parsing errors with Skyline's Swagger 2.0 parser.
authNotes: Requires a Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...) or User Token (xoxp-...). Create a Slack App at https://api.slack.com/apps and install it to your workspace to get a token.
